# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a Helm chart that includes an Ingress resource for our application. Configure the ingress to accept traffic from any hostname for flexibility across different environments (dev, staging, prod). We'll configure TLS certificates later when we move to production.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v2
name: my-app
version: 0.1.0
description: A Helm chart for My App

resources:
  services:
    my-app:
      service:
        type: ClusterIP

  ingresses:
    my-app:
      pathType: Prefix
      hosts:
      - "*"
      tls: {} # This will be filled with TLS configurations when moving to production
      apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1beta1
      kind: Ingress
      metadata:
        name: my-app-ingress
        annotations:
          kubernetes.io/ingress.class: nginx # Replace with the desired ingress class
      spec:
        rules:
        - host: "*"
          http:
            paths:
            - path: /
              backend:
                serviceName: my-app
                servicePort: 80
